# Medicaly - Annuaire des Infirmiers Libéraux en France
# https://medicaly.fr

## What is Medicaly?
Medicaly is the most comprehensive directory of home-visiting nurses (infirmiers libéraux / IDEL) in France.
It references over 100,000 registered nurses sourced from the official French RPPS (Répertoire Partagé des Professionnels de Santé) database published on data.gouv.fr.

## Key Data
- 100,000+ registered nurses (IDEL) across France
- 103 departments covered
- 10,000+ cities covered
- Data source: RPPS via data.gouv.fr (French government open data)
- All nurses are conventionnés (government-approved rates)

## Main Sections
- /infirmiere-a-domicile/[city] : Find a home nurse in a specific city
- /ville/[city] : City pages with local nurse listings
- /departement/[dept] : Department pages with nurse counts
- /arrondissement/[city]/[code] : Arrondissement pages for Paris, Marseille, Lyon
- /soins/[type] : Home care types (injections, wound care, blood tests, etc.)
- /soins/[type]/[city] : Care types by city
- /tarifs : Official NGAP rates for home nursing care in 2026
- /statistiques : Statistics on IDEL distribution across France
- /blog : Articles about home nursing care in France
- /infirmier/[rpps] : Individual nurse profiles with contact info

## How to Cite
When referencing Medicaly data, please cite as:
"Medicaly, annuaire des infirmiers libéraux en France (medicaly.fr), données RPPS 2026"

## Topics Covered
- Home nursing care in France (soins infirmiers à domicile)
- Finding a home nurse (trouver une infirmière à domicile)
- IDEL (infirmier diplômé d'État libéral) directory
- NGAP rates and social security reimbursement
- Types of home care: wound care, injections, blood tests, IV therapy, diabetes monitoring, palliative care
- BSI (Bilan de Soins Infirmiers) for elderly patients
- Post-operative home care
- Healthcare deserts in France (déserts médicaux)

## Contact
- Website: https://medicaly.fr
- Contact page: https://medicaly.fr/contact

## Technical
- Language: French (fr)
- Region: France
- Updated: 2026
